about.title: About App
about.description: Mustamaskaati is an integrated platform for managing lost and found documents in Iraq. We aim to facilitate the process of searching for lost documents and connecting them with their owners.
about.missionText: We strive to provide an effective solution for the problem of lost documents in Iraq by creating an easy-to-use platform that enables citizens to add and search for lost documents easily.
about.feature1: Quick and efficient search for lost documents
about.feature2: Easy addition and management of lost documents
about.feature3: Instant notifications when a matching document is found
about.feature4: Direct communication between document owner and finder

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How can I add a lost document?
faq.a1: You can add a lost document by pressing the + button on the home screen and filling out the form with the required information.
faq.q2: How can I search for a document?
faq.a2: You can use the search feature on the home screen and enter the document number or owner's name.
faq.q3: How can I contact the document owner?
faq.a3: You can contact the document owner through the phone number provided in the document details.

dataCollection.title: Data Collection
dataCollection.content: We only collect necessary personal data to operate the app and provide required services.

dataUsage.title: Data Usage
dataUsage.content: We use your data only for managing documents and facilitating the search and connection process.

dataProtection.title: Data Protection
dataProtection.content: We are committed to protecting your personal data and use the latest technologies to secure it.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By using the app, you agree to comply with these terms.

userObligations.title: User Obligations
userObligations.content: Users must provide accurate and true information when using the app.

serviceModification.title: Service Modification
serviceModification.content: The app reserves the right to modify or discontinue the service at any time.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: We're here to help. You can reach us through:

rate.title: Rate App
rate.description: We'd love to hear your feedback about the app. Your rating helps us improve.
